requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3及危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3及危險貨物文件

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped from China to Thailand should have UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 evidence where dangerous-goods transport rules require it. Exporters should prepare the UN 38.3 test summary, SDS, dangerous-goods classification, packaging evidence, and air or sea transport documentation for the exact shipped configuration.
summary.zh: 从中国运往泰国的锂电芯和电池在危险货物运输规则要求时，应具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分38.3小节证据。出口商应为实际出货配置准备UN 38.3测试概要、SDS、危险货物分类、包装证据以及空运或海运运输文件。
summary.zht: 從中國運往泰國的鋰電芯和電池在危險貨物運輸規則要求時，應具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分38.3小節證據。出口商應為實際出貨配置準備UN 38.3測試概要、SDS、危險貨物分類、包裝證據以及空運或海運運輸文件。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
ICAO Technical Instructions / IATA DGR for air transport

summary.en: China exporters commonly prepare UN 38.3 reports, SDS/MSDS, transport conditions appraisal reports, and dangerous-goods packaging documents for lithium battery shipments. These documents remain necessary but must match the configuration shipped to Thailand.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常为锂电池货运准备UN 38.3报告、SDS/MSDS、运输条件鉴定书和危险货物包装文件。这些文件仍然必要，但必须与实际运往泰国的配置一致。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常為鋰電池貨運準備UN 38.3報告、SDS/MSDS、運輸條件鑑定書和危險貨物包裝文件。這些文件仍然必要，但必須與實際運往泰國的配置一致。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and test summary

gap.en: Transport evidence is configuration-specific. A cell-level UN 38.3 report may not cover a module, rack, containerized BESS, replacement pack, altered state of charge, or changed packaging. Thai importers, ports, carriers, and airlines may reject inconsistent test summaries, SDS classifications, package marks, or shipping names.
gap.zh: 运输证据与配置强相关。电芯级UN 38.3报告未必覆盖模组、电池架、集装箱式BESS、替换电池包、改变荷电状态或改变包装后的货物。泰国进口商、港口、承运人和航空公司可能拒收测试概要、SDS分类、包装标识或运输品名不一致的货物。
gap.zht: 運輸證據與配置強相關。電芯級UN 38.3報告未必覆蓋模組、電池架、集裝箱式BESS、替換電池包、改變荷電狀態或改變包裝後的貨物。泰國進口商、港口、承運人和航空公司可能拒收測試概要、SDS分類、包裝標識或運輸品名不一致的貨物。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Thai project or TISI evidence does not replace UN 38.3 transport evidence. The shipped configuration must be covered by the UN 38.3 test summary and dangerous-goods documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 泰国项目或TISI证据不能替代UN 38.3运输证据。实际出货配置必须被UN 38.3测试概要和危险货物文件覆盖。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 泰國項目或TISI證據不能替代UN 38.3運輸證據。實際出貨配置必須被UN 38.3測試概要和危險貨物文件覆蓋。
